title: Angelic Evolution Adams Children
wikitext:
[]: Angelic Evolution (Adam's Children)             Quote Post by Replicator » Tue Aug 28, 2012 9:55 am In the series, it is stated many times that the Angels and their conception was intimately tied to that of Humans (Lilin), but several questions still need to be asked. Adam's Children are described as "Humans who have cast aside Human form" in EoE, and they developed from 'seeds' that were presumably spread across the Earth by the Second Impact. I'll quote from the Wiki: Accordingly, they appear to begin life as humanoid entities, developing embryologically in perhaps the same way as Adam or an Eva would. Going by Sandalphon, the Angels develop inside oblong objects resembling eggs, compared in the show to a chrysalis. After developing to an indeterminate point, the Angel's human form is “rejected”. Immediately prior to hatching (again, going by Sandalphon's precedent), the Angel undergoes a spontaneous metamorphosis into its "adult form", then emerges from its "chrysalis". How the form is selected and its structure determined is entirely unknown. The A.T. Field appears to play some role in Angel metamorphoses. Taken together with what is said about the role of the A.T. Field elsewhere in the show, this implies that perhaps each Angel’s form is a tangible manifestation of its self-image. That is, where Lilin are more or less constrained to a common form, and must express their individuality in subtler ways, Adam’s children can simply be whatever they imagine themselves to be.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Aug 28, 2012 10:31 am Maybe I should have been a little more direct in the Wiki write-up... When I wrote, "[the Angels] appear to begin life as humanoid entities, developing embryologically in perhaps the same way as Adam or an Eva would", the corollary is, "if they didn't transform, they would continue to mature into an Adam/Eva-type humanoid, i.e., this is precisely the human form that they reject or abandon". Hard to say what size they would be -- Sandalphon's fetus was already bigger than an Eva! -- but pretty sure none of them would look like Lilin. NGE2 shows the Angels prepare to merge with Lilith by reducing their bodies to a Lilin-sized, humanoid blob of light. Not totally sure what that's all about.

[]:             Quote Post by Chroma » Tue Sep 11, 2012 10:34 pm While I doubt that an Adam-based Angel would look like a lilin, the humanoid form may be a constant in the DNA of the decendants of the FAR. Both Lilith and Adam (and the Adam-derived clones AKA: EVAs) are humanoid in form (basically, although things like pylons are obvious differences): For large pics  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Sep 11, 2012 10:51 pm Chroma wrote: Perhaps the FAR themselves are fairly humanoid creatures, which could explain the why the humanoid form is an option for any FAR-descendant species.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Sep 11, 2012 11:00 pm riffraff11235 wrote: I think it's more like the humans are fairly FAR-anoid creatures....

[]:             Quote Post by Pandymint » Wed Sep 12, 2012 12:04 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: The pylons look like something that has been added by humans, Adam doesn't have them in the last pic that you've posted.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Sep 12, 2012 12:13 am ^ yeah, although imo it's a little bizarre that they were also luminescent like the rest of Adam during Second Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Chroma » Wed Sep 12, 2012 4:45 am How could the pylons have been added to Adam? Is it that they were trying to restrain him (hence the pylons) and that's what woke him up?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Sep 12, 2012 5:15 am ^ They were probably trying to restrain it but I think that the awakening was caused by something else, probably the removal of the Spear.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Sep 12, 2012 3:21 pm Adam probably had more artificial additions than just the pylons. There's a hump on the back, f'rinstance, possibly a permutation of CNS-interfering/manipulating technology (signal terminator plugs and such). Can't say why EVERYthing is glowing, though I guess the implication is that Adam is putting out so much energy that even the artificial implants have gone white-hot. BTW, Hyper Shinchan, the Spear had been taken out a ways before the CE, shipped to the Dead Sea, and shipped back. They tried to use it on Adam when the experiment went bonkers, but it didn't put her back to sleep like they wanted it to.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Sep 13, 2012 5:16 am Reichu wrote: BTW, Hyper Shinchan, the Spear had been taken out a ways before the CE, shipped to the Dead Sea, and shipped back. They tried to use it on Adam when the experiment went bonkers, but it didn't put her back to sleep like they wanted it to.

[]:             Quote Post by Tribblepoo » Thu Sep 13, 2012 6:36 pm Reichu wrote: Adam probably had more artificial additions than just the pylons. There's a hump on the back, f'rinstance, possibly a permutation of CNS-interfering/manipulating technology (signal terminator plugs and such). Can't say why EVERYthing is glowing, though I guess the implication is that Adam is putting out so much energy that even the artificial implants have gone white-hot. BTW, Hyper Shinchan, the Spear had been taken out a ways before the CE, shipped to the Dead Sea, and shipped back. They tried to use it on Adam when the experiment went bonkers, but it didn't put her back to sleep like they wanted it to.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Thu Sep 13, 2012 6:57 pm Tribblepoo wrote: Wasn't there a specific quote from the show (it was in a flashback) that stated something to the effect of "initiating contact with the target"? I had been led to believe that this was some sort of experiment involving introducing a foreign body to Adam, perhaps to the core or S2 organ.

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Fri Sep 14, 2012 2:19 pm I just watched episode 21' again and for the first time noticed the time jumping in the opening scene. I wonder why it took me so long to notice that with the clock ticking in the corner? (doing this off the top off my head) The initial conversation happens in August, so certainly Adam is being restrained at that point already. Then the day of second impact, the DNA contact happens around 23 minutes after midnight. The comment about the Longinus spear happens at 33 minutes after midnight. Adam walking happens at 59 minutes after midnight. Before I had the impression that all happened together, but there was a decent span of time from the start of the contact to the moment of second impact.
